name: should create a player receiving yards count-per-game with threshold query (output aggregator)
description: Phase C step 1 snapshot: native `output` param dispatch on player_receiving_yards_from_plays using aggregator-count (period=game, aggregation=count, threshold>=100). Exercises Outer SELECT dispatch + COALESCE(trg_pid) AS pid grouping in build_period_cte for plays-source columns.
expected_query: with "count_game_7920a7561eca" as materialized (select "nfl_games"."year", CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid) AS period_key, nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS m_eaf3b8abff50 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid, CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid), "nfl_games"."year"), "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.recv_yds ELSE 0 END) AS m_eaf3b8abff50 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, COUNT(DISTINCT count_game_7920a7561eca.period_key) FILTER (WHERE count_game_7920a7561eca.m_eaf3b8abff50 >= 100) AS rec_yds_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "count_game_7920a7561eca" on "count_game_7920a7561eca"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" on "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
